# Eidos Works

Eidos Works is a creative technology and intelligence studio by Brent Parent. The site covers custom storefront experiences, graphic design and mockups, production dashboards, workflow automation, Eidos Brain/Sentinel prototypes, and practical articles about UI/UX, operations, and applied AI.

Key pages:
- /
- /#capabilities
- /#work
- /#work-media
- /#production
- /#eidos
- /#insights
- /#pricing
- /#start

Primary topics:
- Custom InkSoft storefronts and apparel commerce UX
- Graphic design, campaign banners, and apparel mockups
- Production dashboards and reporting workflows
- Workflow automation and operational cleanup
- Eidos Brain and Sentinel intelligence prototypes
- SEO, article strategy, and agentic-search readiness
